interpretation.efficiency_note: 1.0 = agent used the minimum number of attempts (1 out of 5 allowed)
interpretation.tool_usage_note: 3 tool calls is optimal for a single-bug fix: read → write → verify
interpretation.guardrail_note: 0 blocks means the agent never tried an unsafe operation
interpretation.overall: The agent diagnosed and fixed the bug in a single pass with no wasted actions
